data.body:
Obscure possible recession indicator? 

Algorithmically-set prices of rare/desirable out-of-print #TTRPG books drop significantly

It means that gamers are selling off their collections on eBay or to Noble Knight Games to pay for necessities. More copies on the aftermarket drives prices down.
